common.fileProcessFailed: Failed to process the file — check its encoding or try another
common.privacyNotice: Your API key and data are stored locally in your browser to ensure privacy. If you have any questions or suggestions, please contact us via the community or feedback page.
common.dragAndDropText: Click or drag file here to upload
common.noTargetLanguage: Select at least one target language.
common.singleFileModeTooltip: Keep only one file; new uploads replace the current file
common.hideResultsTooltip: Hide result preview to prevent page lag from large content
common.directExportTooltip: Automatically download after processing, skipping result preview
common.useCacheTooltip: Reuse previous translation cache to speed up processing
common.contextAwareTranslationTooltip: Translate with context for better coherence and accuracy (AI models only)
common.multiLanguageModeTooltip: Translate to multiple languages simultaneously, saved as separate files
common.resetUploadTooltip: Clear current input and uploaded files
common.sameLanguageTarget: Source and target languages are the same; automatically adjusted target to
common.sameLanguageSource: Source and target languages are the same; automatically adjusted source to
common.enterApiKey: Enter API Key or switch to Free API.
common.enterApiUrl: Please configure the API URL in 'API Settings'.
common.deepLXUnavailable: DeepLX service is temporarily unreachable, automatically switched to GTX API (Free).
common.deeplUnavailable: DeepL service is temporarily unreachable, please check the related settings in API Settings.
common.llmUnavailable: LLM service is temporarily unreachable, please check the related settings in API Settings.
common.noFileUploaded: Please upload a file to process first.
common.sourceTextPlaceholder: Enter or paste text to process...
common.noSourceText: Please enter or paste text content.
common.formatTooltip: Format: remove blank lines and trim leading/trailing spaces
common.resultToSourceTooltip: Overwrite input area with result text
common.readOnlyModeTooltip: Text is too long: the editor is temporarily read-only and shows a partial preview only. Your full content is unaffected — processing and export still use the entire text.
common.clearInputTooltip: Clear input content and uploaded files
common.removeCharsAfterTranslationTooltip: Automatically remove specified characters after translation (separate multiple with spaces)
common.multiLangSettingsHint: Enter language codes, separated by comma or space.
common.retryCountTooltip: Number of retry attempts when translation fails
common.requestTimeoutSecTooltip: Maximum wait per request (seconds). LLM thinking takes longer; 180s or more recommended.
common.customExportFilenameTooltip: '{'name'}' = original filename, '{'lang'}' = language, '{'ext'}' = extension, '{'date'}' = date, '{'time'}' = time
common.partialFailureDesc: Failed lines kept the original text as a placeholder, so the file stays usable. These failures are usually network blips or temporary upstream hiccups — free services and self-hosted servers are especially prone to this, and it's not a problem with your setup. Click Retry to continue (successful lines come from cache, no re-translation); if it still fails, try again later or switch to a different translation service. Or click View failed lines to handle them manually.
common.failedLanguagesDesc: Every batch for these languages errored out — usually local LLM glitches, API rate limits, or the model refusing a specific language. Copy the codes and re-run targeting only them (paste into Quick Entry via Language Codes); the others will hit cache and skip.
common.gtxFreeAPIUnavailable: GTX Free service is temporarily unreachable — could be a network restriction. Please try again later, or switch to a different translation service.
common.edgeFreeAPIUnavailable: Edge Free service is temporarily unreachable — could be a network restriction. Please try again later, or switch to a different translation service.
common.translategemmaUnavailable: TranslateGemma service is temporarily unreachable, please make sure your local server (LM Studio / llama.cpp / Ollama) is running and the URL is correct.
common.networkUnavailable: Translation service is temporarily unreachable — could be a network issue or the service is having a hiccup. Please try again later, or switch to a different translation service.
common.translationTimeout: Translation request timed out — could be a slow network or the service is taking too long to respond. Please try again later, or switch to a different translation service.
common.errorHint400: Invalid request — often a wrong model name or language code, or an unsupported parameter
common.errorHint401: API key is invalid or expired
common.errorHint402: Insufficient account balance — top up with your provider
common.errorHint403: Access forbidden — the key may be invalid, lack permission, or your region may be blocked
common.errorHint404: Endpoint or model not found — check the URL and model name
common.errorHint413: Input too large — reduce the chunk size or split the text
common.errorHint422: A parameter isn't supported by this model — often thinking/reasoning options
common.errorHint429: Rate limit exceeded, please retry later
common.errorHint456: Translation quota exhausted for this billing period
common.errorHintRelay: Network error (possibly CORS) — enable "API Relay" in API Settings
common.errorHintRelay403: The API returned 403 Forbidden — enable "API Relay" in API Settings
common.rateLimitCooldown: Rate limited — pausing briefly, will retry automatically

subtitleTranslator.title: Subtitle Translator
subtitleTranslator.description: Batch translate SRT, ASS, VTT, SBV, LRC subtitles. 120+ languages.

mdTranslator.title: Markdown Translator
mdTranslator.description: Batch translate Markdown, preserving format and code

textSplitter.title: Text Splitter
textSplitter.description: Smart long text splitter for AI and social media

chineseConversion.title: Chinese Conversion
chineseConversion.description: Bulk convert Simplified, Taiwan Traditional, Hong Kong Traditional, and Japanese New Character Form

novelProcessor.title: Chinese Novel Formatter
novelProcessor.description: One-click formatting for downloaded Chinese web novels — smart line breaks, chapter splitting, and clean layout.

textToolbox.title: Multi-Function Text Processor
textToolbox.description: Integrated regex matching, sorting, filtering, and more for bulk text processing

dataBatch.title: Batch Data Processor
dataBatch.description: Excel batch data processing — dedup, column extraction, text merge, custom rules chained in sequence

jsonValueExtractor.title: JSON Field Value Extractor
jsonValueExtractor.description: Batch extract JSON fields with formatting

jsonNodeEdit.title: JSON Node Bulk Edit
jsonNodeEdit.description: Batch edit JSON nodes with prefix/suffix/replace

jsonValueTransformer.title: JSON Field Value Mapper
jsonValueTransformer.description: Field value mapping and migration with JSONPath

jsonValueSwapper.title: JSON Value Swapper
jsonValueSwapper.description: One-click swap of two field values

jsonNodeInserter.title: JSON Node Bulk Insert
jsonNodeInserter.description: Batch insert new nodes at specified position

jsonSortClassify.title: JSON Sort & Group
jsonSortClassify.description: Sort and group arrays with custom rules

jsonMatchUpdate.title: JSON Match Update
jsonMatchUpdate.description: Batch update data by matching fields

textDiff.title: Text Diff
textDiff.description: Compare two texts or files side by side and pinpoint the first difference.
textDiff.metaTitle: Text Diff: Online Text & File Compare, Find Differences
textDiff.metaDescription: Compare two texts or files online with side-by-side highlighting, pinpointing the exact line and column where they first differ.

Metadata.title: ToolsByAI | Free Open Source AI Translation & Data Tools
Metadata.description: ToolsByAI: 17 free open-source tools for subtitle, Markdown, JSON i18n translation and text/JSON batch processing. 25+ AI engines.
Metadata.homeDescription: 20+ tools for translation, text, JSON, and data conversion. Boost efficiency for developers and creators.
Metadata.ogTitle: ToolsByAI | Free Open Source AI Translation & Data Tools
Metadata.ogDescription: ToolsByAI: 17 free open-source tools for subtitle, Markdown, JSON i18n translation and text/JSON batch processing. 25+ AI engines.

CopyToClipboard.unsupported: Browser does not support clipboard, please copy manually

feedback.feedback2: If you encounter issues or have suggestions, let me know! Your feedback drives future development and helps us build better tools for everyone.
feedback.feedback3: Please describe your use case, issue, or creative idea. I read every message and will respond/optimize as soon as possible.
feedback.placeholder: Leave a message (no login required, email optional for reply)
feedback.metaDescription: Feedback for Tools By AI: report bugs, suggest features, share use-case ideas. Built on Waline, anonymous posting allowed, free.

NotFound.title: Page Not Found
NotFound.description: The page you visited doesn't exist or has been moved.

TextDiff.clientDescription: Compare two texts or files in your browser: side-by-side highlighting of every difference, plus a one-line pointer to the exact line and field where they first diverge. Works on plain text, CSV/TSV and INI, with automatic UTF-8 / GBK encoding detection.
TextDiff.pasteHere: Paste or type text here, or drop a file
TextDiff.locAdd: Line {line}: a line was added in B
TextDiff.locDel: Line {line}: a line was deleted from A
TextDiff.notTextFile: This may not be a text file
TextDiff.jsonAsText: JSON is compared line-by-line for now
TextDiff.largeWarning: The two sides differ too much and the comparison timed out — no diff was generated. You can force a full comparison (may be slow).
TextDiff.contextTooltip: Unchanged lines kept around each change when identical sections are folded
TextDiff.exportDiffTooltip: Export as a unified diff (.patch) — usable with git apply / review tools
